textByHashes.a347651f566cbcd1423bcbc8fb873ad8b7c15cef: Welcome to the Emir's Arena! Are you interested in Duels? We organise ranked Duels here, or alternatively you can organise your own unranked Duels.
textByHashes.32b7763ea53516011aca153265b1d387207d7b61: Two fighters are placed in a combat arena together, to battle to the death. The survivor wins the Duel.
textByHashes.8fe15c67fe8edc807c4c5a4b8d0a641b7d356d1d: Everyone has a rank. It's meant to indicate how good they are at fighting, compared to other people.
textByHashes.d0a4485d6d29aaf6195821ede6f26056ff88f077: In ranked fights, the winners gain rank and the losers lose rank. The Arena staff will decide who'll be fighting in each ranked Duel, and send the invitations.
textByHashes.2d3b5bc8e01ba9ad0cadbed29778b067ed93b053: But if you just want some casual fun, you can have an unranked Duel, where no-one gains or loses rank. You can organise your own unranked Duel against whoever you want to fight.
textByHashes.4285a356426d608541ebc1b2e077ef43e92f26fe: Only the ranked fights offer access to the other rewards of the Arena.
textByHashes.819b4b451b8eaebe7f624003a3e447ce7ee3387d: For a ranked Duel, you'll need to sign up to the recruitment group...
textByHashes.bfb46498bfd92048123e769c884b21533dd3e8b6: You can carry on with your adventures while you're waiting for a ranked Duel to begin, since it may be a while before suitable fighters are available.
textByHashes.0dcf213183f6fe88cdb3881a2ca31b571eaff661: For an unranked Duel, other people might challenge you while you're wandering around the PvP Arena, so keep an eye out for invitation messages.
textByHashes.6e9f1b8b442b5da7429292745ba38f38ca34d965: When you see other people wandering around the PvP Arena, you can challenge them directly, and they can challenge you. This would be an unranked Duel, so neither of you would gain rank or earn rewards.
